allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: implement initial backend structure with NestJS and Prisma

Backend implementation for barbershop management system:

- NestJS modular architecture by domain
- 8 domain modules: users, clients, professionals, services, appointments, payments, debts, cash-register
- Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL schema
- Complete entity models and DTOs
- Service layer with documented business logic

Key features:
- User authentication \(ADMIN, PROFESSIONAL roles\)
- Client management with optional email
- Professional scheduling and availability
- Service catalog with pricing
- Appointment booking \(status: SCHEDULED, ATTENDED, CANCELED, NO_SHOW\)
- Manual payment registration \(no gateway integration\)
- Debt tracking \(fiado\) independent of payment method
- Daily cash register management

Important business rules:
- Appointment attendance ≠ payment \(separate concepts\)
- Payments are manually registered only
- Debts are independent of payment method
- One cash register per day

Technical stack:
- NestJS 10.x
- Prisma 5.x
- PostgreSQL
- TypeScript 5.x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
